'''kawuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huckstress|huckstress]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-w-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huckstress|huckstress]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kawuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæwikith|kæwikith]] || [[word:kæwikij|kæwikij]] || [[word:kæwikish|kæwikish]] || [[word:kæwiki|kæwiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kawuwukuth|kawuwukuth]] || [[word:kawuwukuj|kawuwukuj]] || [[word:kawuwukush|kawuwukush]] || [[word:kawuwuku|kawuwuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kawukuth|kawukuth]] || [[word:kawukuj|kawukuj]] || [[word:kawukush|kawukush]] || [[word:kawuku|kawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kawufkuth|kawufkuth]] || [[word:kawufkuj|kawufkuj]] || [[word:kawufkush|kawufkush]] || [[word:kawufkuf|kawufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kawukuthu|kawukuthu]] || [[word:kawukuju|kawukuju]] || [[word:kawukushu|kawukushu]] || [[word:kawukuku|kawukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kawukuth|kawukuth]] || [[word:kawukuj|kawukuj]] || [[word:kawukush|kawukush]] || [[word:kawuku|kawuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kawukuthul|kawukuthul]] || [[word:kawukujul|kawukujul]] || [[word:kawukushul|kawukushul]] || [[word:kawukukul|kawukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kawukuthuthu|kawukuthuthu]] || [[word:kawukujuju|kawukujuju]] || [[word:kawukushushu|kawukushushu]] || [[word:kawukuku|kawukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kawukuthun|kawukuthun]] || [[word:kawukujun|kawukujun]] || [[word:kawukushun|kawukushun]] || [[word:kawukukun|kawukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kawukuthuoro|kawukuthuoro]] || [[word:kawukujuoro|kawukujuoro]] || [[word:kawukushuoro|kawukushuoro]] || [[word:kawukukuoro|kawukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
